heading: Approval to sell a limited amount of the Fund’s gold
label: 286rr Approval to sell a limited amount of the Fund’s gold

children.text: the Fund will provide support to low-income countries that are eligible for the Poverty Reduction and Growth Facility or other low-income lending from the Fund by making available Fund resources of not less than $4,000,000,000;

such Fund resources referenced above will be used to leverage additional support by a significant multiple to provide loans with substantial concessionality and debt service payment relief and/or grants, as appropriate to a country’s circumstances:1So in original. The colon probably should be a semicolon.1
support provided through forgiveness of interest on concessional loans will be provided for not less than two years; and
the support provided to low-income countries occurs within six years, a substantial amount of which shall occur within the initial two years.

children.label: b
children.text: In addition to agreeing to and accepting the amendments referred to in relating to the use of proceeds from the sale of such gold, the United States Governor is authorized, consistent with subsection (a), to take such actions as may be necessary, including those referred to in , to also use such proceeds for the purpose of assisting low-income countries.section 286pp of this titlesection 286c(e) of this title
